description:
Is it really that bad?
Download the Straight Arrow News app by clicking here https://www.san.com/b1m to stay informed with Unbiased. Straight Facts.

🔥 Pre-order Fred's book MEGA BUILDS now 👉 https://bit.ly/3Y63G6X

For more by The B1M subscribe now 👉 https://bit.ly/the-b1m

Full story here - https://www.theb1m.com/video/the-plan-to-save-paris-most-hated-building

This video contains paid promotion for Straight Arrow News. 

Additional footage and images: Nouvelle AOM, Indiana University, BNF, SNCF.

We're raising awareness of construction's mental health crisis through our Get Construction Talking initiative. There’s a video series on our channel and you can find support or donate at - https://www.getconstructiontalking.org/

00:00 Err, is this right?
01:18 Europe ≠ skyscrapers
02:24 A different era
04:59 A new plan
06:31 Maine-Montparnasse
07:24 France's first skyscraper
10:32 Backlash
11:22 Haussman's Paris
12:55 The shock of the new
13:31 A good compromise?
